name: black spirits of earth
summary: Moldy, shadowy spirits that came out of the earth, full of dim rumors picked up in caverns beneath forgotten sea-bottoms; of them old Castro dared not speak much.
description:
In Castro's account of the elder time, the black spirits of earth came out of the earth, moldy and shadowy, and full of dim rumors picked up in caverns beneath forgotten sea-bottoms.

Of them old Castro dared not speak much: he cut himself off hurriedly, and no amount of persuasion or subtlety could elicit more in this direction.

sources.quote: Then came out of the earth the black spirits of earth, moldy and shadowy, and full of dim rumors picked up in caverns beneath forgotten sea-bottoms. But of them old Castro dared not speak much. He cut himself off hurriedly, and no amount of persuasion or subtlety could elicit more in this direction.
sources.context: Chapter 2, The Tale of Inspector Legrasse
